prose: Big day, Alfie — you logged over five hours on your feet, moved close to 6,900 steps, and torched around 2,581 calories while keeping your food to about 2,210, so you finished roughly 371 in the hole. The one gap was protein: at 126g you landed well short of where you want to be, and on a high-burn day like this that's the difference between recovering strong and feeling flat. Hit protein hard first thing tomorrow — front-load it at breakfast and don't let it slip.
